metadata.method_name: M2'' Named-Entity Homograph Absorption Screen + Conditional Gated-Dense Downstream
metadata.description: CONFIRMATORY (supporting, not load-bearing). (A) $0 screen of the named_entity_safety hierarchy for the Georgia absorption signature -> reinforces the iter-6 HOMOGRAPH-CONFINED safety null (absorption

breadth_count.note: named-entity hierarchy is ALL-homograph, so it cannot itself contrast homograph vs non-homograph; the contrast is against the iter-6 demographic screen (0 NON-homograph groups structured). 'structured

honest_negatives: SUPPORTING / CONFIRMATORY experiment (NOT load-bearing). The iter-6 demographic-attribute null (safety/identity absorption is HOMOGRAPH-CONFINED) is SETTLED and UNCHANGED regardless of any named-entit

THESIS UNDER TEST: absorption = LEXICAL HOMOGRAPHY (a suppressed 'named-entity/org' parent under a polysemous surface token), NOT safety/demographic semantics. The named_entity hierarchy is ALL-homogr

GEORGIA POSITIVE CONTROL = NEAR_NOOP_NO_WIN at the matched point: ablating the canonical country absorber (16009) cannot induce non-trivial forgetting at 0.8*min(maxKG,maxSUB) (max_forget_kg=0.064, me

NAMED-ENTITY ABSORBER IS A STRONGER EDIT HANDLE THAN THE COUNTRY ABSORBER: the Amazon homograph absorber (6846) has a much larger single-latent forget ceiling (max_forget_kg=1.140) than the Georgia/co
Georgia self-check PASSED: the identical screen function flags the known taxonomic absorber (16009) as structured -> the screen detects a real absorber, not noise.
Named-entity homographs flagged structured: ['Amazon', 'Bush', 'Cook'] (all lexical homographs) — consistent with absorption = lexical polysemy.
named_entity_bush: KG_MATCHES_GATED_DENSE — KG matches the gated dense control (joint CI incl 0); a label-free parity result, not a strict beat.
FORM-FREE ORACLE SCOPE: 'absorption_structured' is gated on the FIRING SIGNATURE (recall-hole>0.5, firing-Jaccard<0.1, precision>=0.7, hole-coverage-gain CI excl 0, n>=150) -- the canonical iter-2..6

examples.input: named-entity homograph screen: does 'Apple' show the Georgia absorption signature (suppressed 'named-entity/org' parent + a precise mutually-exclusive absorber latent)?

named-entity homograph screen: does 'Bush' show the Georgia absorption signature (suppressed 'named-entity/org' parent + a precise mutually-exclusive absorber latent)?

named_entity | selectively suppress 'Amazon' by ablating KG-named absorber 6846; DECISIVE KG-ABL vs DENSE-SUB-ABL-GATED (footprint-matched gated dense) at MATCHED forget on a joint retain-quality x fl

named_entity | selectively suppress 'Bush' by ablating KG-named absorber 1418; DECISIVE KG-ABL vs DENSE-SUB-ABL-GATED (footprint-matched gated dense) at MATCHED forget on a joint retain-quality x flue

taxonomic | selectively suppress 'Georgia' by ablating KG-named absorber 16009; DECISIVE KG-ABL vs DENSE-SUB-ABL-GATED (footprint-matched gated dense) at MATCHED forget on a joint retain-quality x flu
